rationale: The citing paper explicitly includes Experiment 3 to test whether its naming effects are explained by domestic-versus-foreign image (i.e., country-image/country-of-origin mechanisms). The cited paper is a theory-driven study of cultural variation in country-of-origin effects, making it a plausible mechanism/theory source rather than an obvious incidental mention; with only DOI-level match evidence, this pair should be kept for full relation judgment.
